notes: Fix DEF (boxes) data integrity bug. v2.6.5 introduced defGal = defBoxes * 2.5 derivation for MPG math, but the frontend was also aliasing defAmount = defGal, and the backend writes defAmount into the DEF (boxes) column. So if a driver typed 2 boxes, the system stored 5. Fixed: defAmount now sources from defBoxes. Juan caught this — paperwork said 2, dashboard showed 5.
